backend/main.mo: Motoko canister implementing message storage, user profiles, trusted contacts, and access-controlled queries and updates for encrypted messaging.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report listing features, associated files, components, tests, and confidence levels.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Prewritten summary map describing the purpose of various frontend source files.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind-based global style definitions with OKLCH color variables for light/dark themes and UI components.
frontend/index.html: Base HTML entry point loading the React application via main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Sets up TanStack Router, theme provider, and top-level application routing structure inside AuthGate and AppShell.
frontend/src/components/auth/AuthGate.ts: Authentication wrapper enforcing Internet Identity login and triggering profile setup for new users.
frontend/src/components/auth/LoginButton: Login/logout button handling Internet Identity authentication with loading states and session clearing.
frontend/src/components/dashboard/TokenL: Diagnostics panel fetching and displaying token ledger configuration checks with refresh and clipboard export.
frontend/src/components/dashboard/TokenR: Provides a token receive UI showing the user’s principal and a copy-to-clipboard button with validation and toast feedback.
frontend/src/components/dashboard/TokenS: Implements a token send form with validation, configuration checks, and simulated send behavior with toast notifications.
frontend/src/components/dashboard/Tokens: Displays available tokens and toggles between send and receive panels for each using tabbed navigation.
frontend/src/components/dashboard/Transp: Shows transport‑key diagnostic status fields and provides JSON export via copy‑to‑clipboard.
Defines the main app layout with navigation, header, footer, and wrapped page content.
frontend/src/components/messages/Diagnos: Displays message‑send eligibility diagnostics and allows exporting diagnostic JSON.
frontend/src/components/messages/Iso2002: Provides a form-based ISO20022 message editor with live raw-message preview generation.
frontend/src/components/messages/RawPrev: Shows raw message text inside a card with a copy‑to‑clipboard button and toast notifications.
frontend/src/components/messages/SwiftCo: Form-based Swift message editor that updates a generated raw preview using generateSwiftRaw.
frontend/src/config/tokens.ts: Defines token configs, expected ledger IDs, and helper functions to validate and access token metadata.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and manages a backend actor tied to the user's identity, refreshing dependent queries when it changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides React context for Internet Identity login, stored identity loading, and auth state management.
frontend/src/hooks/useProfiles.ts: React Query hooks for fetching and saving user profiles through the backend actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Hooks for retrieving and sending messages via the backend actor with React Query caching.
frontend/src/hooks/useSyncStatus.ts: Fetches relationship sync status between the caller and another principal.
frontend/src/hooks/useTokenLedgerDiagnos: Runs diagnostics comparing configured ledger IDs to expected ones and fetches token ledger metadata.
frontend/src/hooks/useTransportKey.ts: Manages transport keypair generation, persistence, restoration, and backend registration using a vetKey system.
frontend/src/hooks/useTrustedContacts.ts: Provides React Query hooks to get, add, remove, and check trusted contacts via the actor API.
frontend/src/index.css: Defines Tailwind base styles and CSS variables for light/dark themes with custom color tokens.
frontend/src/lib/crypto/e2ee.ts: Implements hybrid RSA-OAEP + AES-GCM encryption and decryption for end-to-end encrypted payloads.
frontend/src/lib/crypto/transportKeys.ts: Generates, imports, and exports RSA-OAEP transport keypairs, including base64 serialization for local storage.
frontend/src/lib/icrc/icrcLedgerClient.t: Creates a read‑only ICRC‑1 ledger actor and fetches ledger metadata such as name, symbol, decimals, and fee.
frontend/src/lib/messageFormats/iso20022: Defines ISO20022 message structure and helpers to create, serialize to XML, and parse back from XML.
frontend/src/lib/messageFormats/swift.ts: Defines SWIFT MT103 message structure with functions to create, serialize, and parse SWIFT raw text.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Bootstraps the React app with QueryClient and Internet Identity providers.
frontend/src/pages/ComposeMessagePage.ts: UI page for composing ISO20022 or SWIFT messages, selecting recipients, checking sync status, and sending encrypted messages.
frontend/src/pages/ContactsPage.tsx: Renders the trusted contacts list with profile lookup, sync status checks, and actions to refresh or remove contacts.
frontend/src/pages/DashboardPage.tsx: Displays user identity, transport key status, diagnostics, and actions for copying principal, vetKey, and navigating to compose messages.
frontend/src/pages/InboxPage.tsx: Shows all sent and received messages with metadata and navigation to message details.
frontend/src/pages/MessageDetailPage.tsx: Displays full message details, decrypts content using the transport key, and parses ISO 20022 or SWIFT formats.
frontend/src/pages/ProfileSetupModal.tsx: Modal for initial profile setup allowing users to enter and save their name.
frontend/src/utils/base64.ts: Provides helper functions to convert between Uint8Array, ArrayBuffer, and base64 strings.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utilities for reading, storing, and clearing URL parameters, supporting both query and hash routing.
frontend/src/utils/vetKey.ts: Provides utilities to generate, validate, store, retrieve, and clear session-scoped vetKey identifiers and related transport keypair data in sessionStorage.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Configures Tailwind with custom colors, animations, container settings, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Defines the project state, including existing features, pending requests, and metadata for adding token symbol glyphs.
